qualification.details: M.Sc. Degree in Geology/ Applied Geology from a recognized university.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Presidency University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at Presidency University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 30th June 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. Degree in Geology or Applied Geology from a university that is recognized by the relevant authorities. This is the primary educational requirement for the position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month. This stipend is provided for the duration of the contractual employment.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will primarily be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted and called for an interview to assess their suitability.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position is a contractual role. This means the employment is for a fixed period as specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Presidency University located?
faq.answer: Presidency University is located in Kolkata, West Bengal, with the pincode 700073. This is the location where the recruitment is being conducted.

faq.question: Q9. What documents do I need to attach with my application?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with your application.

faq.question: Q10. When is the interview date for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The interview for the Junior Research Fellow position is scheduled to be held on 2nd July 2026. Candidates who are shortlisted will be informed about the interview details.
